system.requirement: You and your horse ride as one.

abilities.description: Swift: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.e6ed148eff82c171]{Face Danger} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.d9208f9b7d827aec]{React Under Siege} +edge using your horse’s speed and grace, or when you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ed490d43a2533506]{Journey} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3ff03b51f620ab26]{Undertake an Expedition}, add +1.

Fearless: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.2f2ba4090b22a122]{Enter the Fray} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} +heart by charging into combat, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.

Mighty: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash} at close range while mounted, add +1 and inflict +1 harm on a hit.
